audit_items.proof_trace: Property holds: ProcessProposerLookahead runs at epoch N-1 end (slot N*32-1), computes lastEpoch=(N-1)+MIN_SEED_LOOKAHEAD+1=N+1, shifts out epoch N-1 proposers, and fills last epoch with N+1 proposers. At epoch N start, lookahead[0:32] contains epoch N proposers and lookahead[32:64] contains epoch N+1 proposers, satisfying the deterministic lookahead requirement.
